description_long: This is a cylindrical yellow plastic container with a wide, flat red lid that fits snugly on top. The body of the cup is smooth and slightly tapered, with the base being narrower than the opening. The front of the cup prominently displays the Play-Doh logo in bold, playful lettering on a white and red background, adding a distinctive branded appearance. The lid appears to be made of the same plastic material as the body and features embossed text or design, likely for branding or grip. The container is lightweight and hollow, designed to hold soft modeling compound or similar contents. Its overall appearance is bright, colorful, and intended to be visually appealing, especially to children.
description: A yellow plastic cup with a red lid and a prominent Play-Doh logo on the front, featuring a smooth, tapered body and playful branding.
description_view_0: The yellow cup with a red lid is shown from the back, with no visible logo or branding.
description_view_1: The cup is rotated to reveal part of the Play-Doh logo on the side, with the red lid and yellow body clearly visible.
description_view_2: The front view displays the full Play-Doh logo on the yellow cup, with the red lid on top.
description_view_3: The cup is shown from an angle, with the edge of the Play-Doh logo partially visible and the red lid prominent.
